response.justification: Candidate has strong technical alignment with the stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, REST, SQL exposure) and is Berlin-based, satisfying the on-site requirement. However, the role is explicitly entry-level, and the candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience. There is a high risk of overqualification, compensation mismatch, and short tenure. Worth a screening call only if the team is flexible on leveling or if budget allows for a senior hire.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms
Berlin-based, fits the high on-site presence requirement
Hands-on AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM/agent tooling experience covering all nice-to-haves
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level role; likely compensation and retention mismatch
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed (MongoDB/MySQL primary); no Nest.js mentioned
Domain experience is in martech/fintech/GIS, not renewable energy or construction tech

key_factors.factor: Core stack alignment (TS, Node, React, AWS, K8s)
Missing explicit PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience
